inline_comments.message:
I think this line should be with more information and less line-breaks:
```
        assertThat("ENTRY & EXIT logs are expected to include RequestId and request path in exactly two rows - inside the audit log: \n" + String.join("\n", logLines),
```

But the current is fair from most of the line breaks perspective.
So this is acceptable as well IMO:
```
        assertThat("ENTRY & EXIT logs are expected to include \nRequestId: "
                + requestId+
                " \nand request path: "
                + path +
                "\nin exactly two rows - inside the audit log in: \n" 
                + String.join("\n", logLines),
```
